title: Oden’s Past Begins to Define Wano’s Tragedy
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Oden, Law, Kinemon, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
scene: The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Why do you guys keep following me...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He would fight any man he locked eyes with and Kidnap any woman."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "...but it turned out to be Raiza, a genius Ninja who resigned from the Kozuki family's oniwabanshu.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He was heartbroken after being rejected by a kunoichi.”

dialogue.speaker: Oden
dialogue.text: Lord Oden!! I am sick...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: of living in hiding like some hermit!!

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: The lawless land of Kuri

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Kozuki Oden is coming to Kuri?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Shogun's own blood, huh... I would love to kill him...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: bring him to me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Yes, sir!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I hate privileged people with power the most!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: “I’ve

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Where is Sir Open?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He said he was going to relieve himself... I think he went south.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I thought he said that yesterday?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He often disappears for a day or two on a whim, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, wait a second! Kuri is to the south!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What!?-

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How Disgraceful!! I swore that I would die for him...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: But I am late to the battle!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Look!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The front gate is broken!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: "After I broke open the gate..."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hehe he...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "I was over- wheelmed by the stench of blood, sweat, and corpses."

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: So you are Kozukii Open?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was disowned. That is no longer my name.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: “It was as if the entire world turned its killing intent...”

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: "AND DIRECTED IT TOWARDS ME...!!"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: “The rules there seemed simple...”

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "One is free to enter, but leaving would mean death."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Tell your boss...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: that a Samuel has come.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "How stifling! Such an environment is unfit for humans."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: "Never leave...?"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "That is the kind of rule I hate the most!!"

dialogue.speaker: Oden
dialogue.text: Hurry, look for Lord Oden!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: There is dust coming from the mountain!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: He must be there!!

dialogue.speaker: Oden
dialogue.text: Sir Oden!! We are here to help!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: They followed me... even out here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Sorry...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I just finished up here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It took all night...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I cannot believe it took that long....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So this is the power of the infamous Ashura Douji..!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: HURRY UP AND KILL ME...!! It WAS INEVITABLE THAT MY LIFE WOULD END LIKE THIS...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I HAVE NO REGRETS.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hey, you lot....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Do you all still adore me?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will be needing your strength and wits...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I have decided that I want to...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Become the King of These Scumbags!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden and the Old Era storyline with 54 dialogue beats. The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
